understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based puzzle to complete all goal cells across multiple levels. Each goal cell requires your carried piece to simultaneously match a specific shape, color, and rotation. To complete a goal, you must first use modifier tiles on the grid to adjust your piece's attributes (shape, color, rotation) until they match the goal's requirements, then step onto the goal cell. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and all levels must be won to finish the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Running out of stamina resets it to max but costs a life. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement; the game state provides blocked_directions each turn. Modifier tiles act when stepped on: shape mod cycles shape (0-5), color mod cycles color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), rotation mod adds 90° clockwise (0→90→180→270→0). A goal is satisfied only when shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements; stepping on a matching goal completes it. Stamina refill tiles exist but were not encountered in this episode.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate a grid-based puzzle to complete all goal cells across multiple levels. Each goal cell requires your carried piece to simultaneously match a specific shape, color, and rotation. To complete a goal, you must first use modifier tiles on the grid to adjust your piece's attributes (shape, color, rotation) until they match the goal's requirements, then step onto the goal cell. All goals in a level must be completed to advance, and all levels must be won to finish the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement costs 1 stamina per step. Running out of stamina resets it to max but costs a life. Losing all lives ends the game. Walls block movement; the game state provides blocked_directions each turn. Modifier tiles act when stepped on: shape mod cycles shape (0-5), color mod cycles color (orange→blue→green→red→orange), rotation mod adds 90° clockwise (0→90→180→270→0). A goal is satisfied only when shape, color, and rotation all match its requirements; stepping on a matching goal completes it. Stamina refill tiles exist but were not encountered in this episode.
